medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Patient is a ___ y.o female with hx of diabetes, hyperlipidemia and extensive PVD including Fem-fem bypass, iliofem bypass and iliac stents with no known CAD who was transferred for cardiac cath. She initially presented to ___ with chest pain and numbness/tingling that radiated to left arm and neck and started on ___. Pain is worse at night and with exertion. She was admitted to the hospital on ___. ACS workout was negative (negative troponins and EKG). Stress test was done showing ischemic ekg changes, chest pain and a large inferior defect. She was transfered to ___ for cardiac cath. She was chest pain free and npo at the time of transfer.
medical_history.past_medical_history: 1. CARDIAC RISK FACTORS: Diabetes, Dyslipidemia, Hypertension 2. CARDIAC HISTORY: s/p single DES to PDA, and balloon rescue of the jailed branch of RPL through radial artery. 10%LCX, 20%serial RCA, 90% PDA/PL 3. OTHER PAST MEDICAL HISTORY: -Coilitis (ischemic vs. infectious) -T2DM, on insulin -HTN -COPD -GERD -OSA on CPAP -HLD -Vertigo -Rectal incontinence -depression -lumbar back pain with MRI with mild nerve deformity hx of femfem bypass (right to left) and left sided stents -radiofrequency lesioning of the right-sided L4, L5, and SA medial branches after having previously undergone radiofrequency ablation of the left side on ___
medical_history.family_history: MI (father at ___ mother at age ___, DM, sister with ___ revascularizations at age ___, brother CABG at age ___.
